headlines.title: Russia Bans Diesel Exports Amid Heavy Ukraine Attacks On Refineries

headlines.title: Oil Prices Jump over 7% as Iran Ceasefire Declared ‘Over’
headlines.summary: Oil prices surged over 7% to a two-week high on Wednesday after U.S. President Donald Trump declared that the interim ceasefire agreement with Iran is officially over and dismissed the recently signed memorandum of understanding as a "waste of time." headlines.title: EIA: Crude Oil Inventories in US See Rare Build
headlines.summary: Crude oil inventories in the United States saw a surprise increase of 3.0 million barrels during the week ending July 3, according to new data from the U.S. Energy Information Administration (EIA) released on Wednesday. headlines.title: Vitol Eyes Venezuela Expansion as Oil Industry Returns
